createdValueNode: Amazing work - you’ve just taken a powerful step toward understanding what truly drives your happiness. The more often you return to reflect on your values, the clearer your direction becomes — in relationships, in decisions, and in life itself. Come back anytime you need clarity, alignment, or a reminder of what really matters.

disabledModal.title: Hey there
disabledModal.description:
Looks like you’ve already recorded your values for today. Great job! 

Once a day is enough. 

In the meantime you can click on the Meanings Library and work on the semantic portion of your values as you please. 

And always remember that consistency is key here. Doing a little bit every day will result in incredible outcomes over time

firstModal.title: Recalling moments of happiness
firstModal.description: Spend a few minutes recalling moments of happiness. Replay in your mind the times you truly felt joy. Use your senses to relive them — the emotions, the sensations, the brightness. With every reflection, let these memories grow stronger and more vivid, as if you're experiencing that happiness again and again.

secondModal.title: What values guide your life?
secondModal.description: Picture a future where you thrive, where everything feels aligned and full of purpose. When you feel your mood shift and uplift, ask yourself: What values must guide my life in order for this vision of happiness to become my reality?

thirdModal.title: What sparks joy in you?
thirdModal.description: Write down the words that fill you with energy, that spark joy, and bring a rush of vitality — words that make you feel alive and in flow.

fourModal.title: Guidelines
fourModal.description: Always stay in your comfort zone — no stress, no force. Be kind and patient with yourself. Don’t peek at past reflections before you dive into the new one — each session is a fresh start.

fiveModal.title: Your values
fiveModal.description: Read out loud: What should my top values be in order for my idea of happiness to actualize fully? Write down everything that comes to your mind - 1-2 words per line.

nModal.title: Enter meanings
nModal.description: Synthesize button is unavailable until the value has at least two meanings entered.

semanticSynthesis.notificationDescription: Scroll through your previous entries of the same value and merge them into a more comprehensive meaning.

profile.dayValueText: Love is a feeling unity with everything and everyone in this shared and shaped reality. It's a space of trust and conducive growth, of becoming better. Of synergy. It's a warm and cozy place from which one can only create.

common.notSupportVideo: Your browser does not support video.

firstWindow.title: ETHOS
firstWindow.description: Enhancing your humanity for a better world

firstAuth.title: Welcome to Ethos Universe
firstAuth.description: Take a moment to be completely alone, where no one can interrupt you for the next 5-10 mins. This is crucial for what's ahead.

secondAuth.title: Welcome back to Ethos Universe
secondAuth.description: Take a moment to be completely alone, where no one can interrupt you for the next 5-10 mins. This is crucial for what's ahead.

slide1.description: Awesome! Let's explore how your values shift and how they come to life. Join the 7-day insight streak — regular practice strengthens your alignment with what truly matters to you by taking your values from the subconscious to the conscious level. At the end of the week, you'll receive an analysis of how your value system has evolved.

slide2.description: Consistency is key. When you complete your 7-day Insight Streak without missing a day, you'll 2X your token count. More clarity, more insights, more rewards. Your future self will thank you.

slide3.description: You will go through a series of simple reflective exercises in the next 5-10 mins. A few reminders before you get started: Always stay in your comfort zone while doing the exercises - no stress, no force. Be kind and patient with yourself. Don't peek at past iterations before diving into the new one and don't attempt to memorize your iterations - each session is a fresh start. Whenever you feel ready - click the Let's start button to continue.

slide1.description: This is your chance to truly connect with what matters most to you. Let's uncover your core values — one day at a time. Join the 7-day insight streak — regular practice strengthens your alignment with what truly matters to you by taking your values from the subconscious to the conscious level. At the end of the week, you'll receive an analysis of how your value system has evolved.

weeklyStats.description: Let's see your Values Stats for this week and analyze some of your important data points.

exploreMeanings.title: Let’s explore what your top values mean to you
exploreMeanings.description: Tap on any value that calls your name right now.

greatJob.title: Great job!
greatJob.description: Now you can choose to share your meaning with the world (this will be reflected on your profile) for 2 additional tokens.

giveValueDefinition.title: Give your value a definition
giveValueDefinition.description: Here you can define the meaning of the chosen value that elicits the most positive emotional response right now. Don't try to outsmart yourself. No need to show off. Whatever comes to mind just dot it down in 1-2 sentences.

meaningsDashboard.title: Meanings Dashboard
meaningsDashboard.description: This is the stats section of your values meanings. Let's see what you can explore here.

modal.title: What others have to say
modal.description:
Check out what others have to say about this same value.
Sometimes, just one new perspective can unlock a whole new layer of meaning.
We humans bring new dimensions to one another - that's how we grow.
